channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Several pot holes which keep geeting repaired and then have failed a month later .this has happened several times .needs fixing properley .7 pot holes in total ./, 19th March
item.description:
Vicarge lane junction with mill lane brockworth gloucester what three words circle.appointed.whover and sliders.prawn.reclining
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Mill Lane, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous loose manhole cover in the middle of the hare and hounds junction, 19th March
item.description:
In the middle of the hare and hounds junction churchdown, not only is it extremely noisy throughout the day and night as it’s a very busy junction but it’s becoming very dangerous as it clatters about, this has been a problem for months now but nothing has been done
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2-4, Cheltenham Road East, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large area of missing tarmac as cars turn, 19th March
item.description:
Telstar Way turning right to go towards Golden Valley ... in middle of lights as cars need to rurn
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Telstar Way, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bridge height restriction sign misaligned, 19th March
item.description:
The sign is mounted on the railway bridge that passes over Hyde Lane, located on the Bishop's Cleeve side of the bridge.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hyde Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

Near new house which has been built on west side of A46.

item.title: Crumbling pavements and potholes both sides of the road., 19th March
item.description:
Just round the corner on welch Rd from village Rd and on the corner on of ismay Rd, joining welch Rd. Struggling to get wheelchair over it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 101, Welch Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham

item.title: 2 shopping trolleys in the Brook, 19th March
item.description:
In Wymans Brook upside down so unable to identify , nearest property is 46 Limber Hill
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Thomond Close, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham

item.title: Lots of bottles and glass bottles duimoed in the corner of the public car park at Wymans Brook, 19th March
item.description:
The glass bottles are being broken all over the car park and causing a hazard to all drivers, public and children suing this car park. This dumped rubbish appears to have been dumped following race week
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wymans Court, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 19th March
item.description:
Email received 11/03/2026 - copy attached. Customer reports a tree at the location which is not cut back frequently enough to stop it rubbing on the walls, window or cables of the adjacent property. It blocks light and gets in the way of the residents when opening the window in the summer. Please can appropriate action be taken.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian/ cycle symbols the wrong way round, 19th March
item.description:
Outside number 54 as photographed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56, Lansdown Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Overhanging tree branches are causing a nuisance. Leaf fall into my garden, the path behind it is a big issue during Autumn. Twigs and branches fall onto my shed roof and the guttering serving my garage is blocked with leaf litter and fallen twigs. I have spoken to Tewkesbury Borough Council and they have told me that they are not responsible for this footpath., 19th March
item.description:
Trees located along northern verge of footpath behind 15 Greenacre Way, Bishops Cleeve, GL52 8SQ

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Honeysuckle Way, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose and noisy manhole cover, 19th March
item.description:
The manhole cover outside my Neighbours house at 6 Shurdington Rd is extremely noisy and rattles all day and night I am so fed up with the constant disturbance The bedrooms facing Shurdington Rd are almost unusable, please could you send someone out to sort it thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Brooksdale Lane, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 19th March
item.description:
Dear Sir/Madam Over a year ago a GCC Highways tree fell down and damaged the fencing in front of Circus Nursery on Pittville Circus Road. The tree was removed by your contractor. The roots were supposed to be removed as a priority, because they stand at around 70cm tall in the verge and next to a parking bay. This parking bay is used by parents delivering their young children to the nursery and the standing root gets in the way of opening the car door. Would you please have a look at this and let me know if removal of the root is scheduled please? OR at least could you ask the contractor to cut it down to a much lower height? Kind regards
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 potholes, 19th March
item.description:
Along Beaufort Road at the bottom of the slope. The location is audit.dash.strain but they are spread over the road area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Charlton Court Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes in road, 19th March
item.description:
Outside the entrance to keltruck Ltd Cheltenham

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree causing bird faeces and leaves on newly refurbished building, 19th March
item.description:
The tree outside 109 Promenade. This tree homes birds which are defecating all over the outside of a Grade II listed building that we have spent the last year refurbishing. We request that the branches be cut back so the birds can relieve themselves away from 109.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Promenade, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
